findings.title: Signal has partial reference plane gap
findings.description: Net /MCU/IO19 has 94% reference plane coverage over 28.8mm of routing. Return current must detour around the gap, creating a loop antenna.
findings.recommendation: Route this signal to avoid ground plane gaps, or fill the void. If a split is intentional, add a bridge capacitor across the gap.
findings.summary: Signal has partial reference plane gap

findings.title: Signal has partial reference plane gap
findings.description: Net /MCU/IO18 has 94% reference plane coverage over 29.8mm of routing. Return current must detour around the gap, creating a loop antenna.
findings.recommendation: Route this signal to avoid ground plane gaps, or fill the void. If a split is intentional, add a bridge capacitor across the gap.
findings.summary: Signal has partial reference plane gap

findings.title: Low ground plane fill ratio
findings.description: Ground zone on F.Cu has 50% fill ratio. Excessive routing or thermal relief patterns may be reducing ground plane effectiveness.
findings.recommendation: Reduce routing density on this layer or move signals to other layers.

findings.title: Low ground plane fill ratio
findings.description: Ground zone on B.Cu has 56% fill ratio. Excessive routing or thermal relief patterns may be reducing ground plane effectiveness.
findings.recommendation: Reduce routing density on this layer or move signals to other layers.

findings.title: No EMC filtering near J7
findings.description: Connector J7 (Right Motor) has no ferrite bead, CM choke, or ESD protection within 25mm. Unfiltered I/O cables are the dominant source of radiated emissions — common-mode current as low as 5 µA can exceed FCC Class B.
findings.recommendation: Add a ferrite bead (e.g., BLM18AG601SN1D, 600Ω@100MHz) on signal lines near J7. Add ESD/TVS protection for external interfaces.

findings.title: No EMC filtering near J3
findings.description: Connector J3 (Conn_01x04) has no ferrite bead, CM choke, or ESD protection within 25mm. Unfiltered I/O cables are the dominant source of radiated emissions — common-mode current as low as 5 µA can exceed FCC Class B.
findings.recommendation: Add a ferrite bead (e.g., BLM18AG601SN1D, 600Ω@100MHz) on signal lines near J3. Add ESD/TVS protection for external interfaces.

findings.title: No EMC filtering near J8
findings.description: Connector J8 (Left Motor) has no ferrite bead, CM choke, or ESD protection within 25mm. Unfiltered I/O cables are the dominant source of radiated emissions — common-mode current as low as 5 µA can exceed FCC Class B.
findings.recommendation: Add a ferrite bead (e.g., BLM18AG601SN1D, 600Ω@100MHz) on signal lines near J8. Add ESD/TVS protection for external interfaces.

findings.title: No EMC filtering near J9
findings.description: Connector J9 (Battery Connector) has no ferrite bead, CM choke, or ESD protection within 25mm. Unfiltered I/O cables are the dominant source of radiated emissions — common-mode current as low as 5 µA can exceed FCC Class B.
findings.recommendation: Add a ferrite bead (e.g., BLM18AG601SN1D, 600Ω@100MHz) on signal lines near J9. Add ESD/TVS protection for external interfaces.

findings.title: Insufficient ground pins on J7
findings.description: J7 (Right Motor) has 0 ground pin(s) for 3 signal pins. Recommended: at least 2 ground pins for adequate return current path and cable shielding.
findings.recommendation: Ensure J7 has sufficient ground pins. For high-speed interfaces, ground pins should be distributed among signal pins, not grouped at one end.

findings.title: Insufficient ground pins on J8
findings.description: J8 (Left Motor) has 0 ground pin(s) for 3 signal pins. Recommended: at least 2 ground pins for adequate return current path and cable shielding.
findings.recommendation: Ensure J8 has sufficient ground pins. For high-speed interfaces, ground pins should be distributed among signal pins, not grouped at one end.

findings.title: Insufficient ground pins on J9
findings.description: J9 (Battery Connector) has 1 ground pin(s) for 4 signal pins. Recommended: at least 2 ground pins for adequate return current path and cable shielding.
findings.recommendation: Ensure J9 has sufficient ground pins. For high-speed interfaces, ground pins should be distributed among signal pins, not grouped at one end.

findings.title: Adjacent signal layers: F.Cu, B.Cu
findings.description: Signal layers F.Cu and B.Cu are adjacent without a reference plane between them. This causes high crosstalk and poor return path control for signals on both layers.
findings.recommendation: Reorder stackup to place a ground or power plane between every pair of signal layers.

findings.title: Board cavity resonance frequencies
findings.description: Board (78×75mm, εr=4.5) cavity resonances: (1,0) at 906 MHz; (0,1) at 939 MHz; (1,1) at 1305 MHz; (2,0) at 1812 MHz; (0,2) at 1878 MHz. PDN impedance spikes at these frequencies. Ensure adequate decoupling at and around these frequencies.
findings.recommendation: Add decoupling capacitors with SRF near these frequencies.

findings.title: Signal near board edge: /Battery Recharger/CBSET_PIN
findings.description: Net /Battery Recharger/CBSET_PIN on F.Cu is 0.53mm from the board edge (dielectric height: 1.51mm). Traces near the edge lack full ground plane reference and act as slot antennas.
findings.recommendation: Route signal away from board edge or add ground pour to the edge area.

findings.title: Signal near board edge: /Battery Recharger/REGN
findings.description: Net /Battery Recharger/REGN on F.Cu is 0.48mm from the board edge (dielectric height: 1.51mm). Traces near the edge lack full ground plane reference and act as slot antennas.
findings.recommendation: Route signal away from board edge or add ground pour to the edge area.

findings.title: Signal near board edge: /Battery Recharger/CBSET_IN
findings.description: Net /Battery Recharger/CBSET_IN on F.Cu is 0.13mm from the board edge (dielectric height: 1.51mm). Traces near the edge lack full ground plane reference and act as slot antennas.
findings.recommendation: Route signal away from board edge or add ground pour to the edge area.

findings.title: Missing stitching via at layer transition: /Battery Recharger/REGN
findings.description: Net /Battery Recharger/REGN has 3 layer transition(s) across B.Cu, F.Cu. 2 transition(s) have no ground stitching via within 3.0mm. The return current must find an alternate path, creating a loop antenna.
findings.recommendation: Add a ground stitching via within 3.0mm of each signal via. Place the ground via adjacent to the signal via on the same pad cluster.
findings.summary: Missing stitching via at layer transition: /Battery Recharger/REGN

findings.title: Missing stitching via at layer transition: /Power Rails/EN

findings.recommendation: Add a ground stitching via within 3.0mm of each signal via. Place the ground via adjacent to the signal via on the same pad cluster.
findings.summary: Missing stitching via at layer transition: /Power Rails/EN

findings.title: Single ground via near ESD device U4
findings.description: U4 (esd_ic) has 1 ground via within 3mm. Multiple parallel vias reduce ground inductance. Two vias halve the inductance (~0.5nH → ~0.25nH).
findings.recommendation: Add a second ground via near U4 for lower inductance.
findings.summary: Single ground via near ESD device U4

findings.title: U5 harmonics in 30-88 MHz band
findings.description: U5 (AP63200WU) switching at 0.5 MHz has 117 harmonics in the 30-88 MHz band (harmonics 60-176). Envelope rolloff at 32 MHz (-40 dB/decade above).
findings.recommendation: Minimize switching loop area for U5. Place input cap as close as possible. Consider spread-spectrum modulation if available.

findings.title: U5 harmonics in 88-216 MHz band
findings.description: U5 (AP63200WU) switching at 0.5 MHz has 257 harmonics in the 88-216 MHz band (harmonics 176-432). Envelope rolloff at 32 MHz (-40 dB/decade above).
findings.recommendation: Minimize switching loop area for U5. Place input cap as close as possible. Consider spread-spectrum modulation if available.

findings.title: U5 harmonics in 216-960 MHz band
findings.description: U5 (AP63200WU) switching at 0.5 MHz has 1489 harmonics in the 216-960 MHz band (harmonics 432-1920). Envelope rolloff at 32 MHz (-40 dB/decade above).
findings.recommendation: Minimize switching loop area for U5. Place input cap as close as possible. Consider spread-spectrum modulation if available.

findings.title: U7 harmonics in 30-88 MHz band
findings.description: U7 (AP63205WU) switching at 0.5 MHz has 117 harmonics in the 30-88 MHz band (harmonics 60-176). Envelope rolloff at 32 MHz (-40 dB/decade above).
findings.recommendation: Minimize switching loop area for U7. Place input cap as close as possible. Consider spread-spectrum modulation if available.

findings.title: U7 harmonics in 88-216 MHz band
findings.description: U7 (AP63205WU) switching at 0.5 MHz has 257 harmonics in the 88-216 MHz band (harmonics 176-432). Envelope rolloff at 32 MHz (-40 dB/decade above).
findings.recommendation: Minimize switching loop area for U7. Place input cap as close as possible. Consider spread-spectrum modulation if available.

findings.title: U7 harmonics in 216-960 MHz band
findings.description: U7 (AP63205WU) switching at 0.5 MHz has 1489 harmonics in the 216-960 MHz band (harmonics 432-1920). Envelope rolloff at 32 MHz (-40 dB/decade above).
findings.recommendation: Minimize switching loop area for U7. Place input cap as close as possible. Consider spread-spectrum modulation if available.

findings.title: U9 harmonics in 30-88 MHz band
findings.description: U9 (TPS62162DSG) switching at 0.5 MHz has 117 harmonics in the 30-88 MHz band (harmonics 60-176). Envelope rolloff at 32 MHz (-40 dB/decade above).
findings.recommendation: Minimize switching loop area for U9. Place input cap as close as possible. Consider spread-spectrum modulation if available.

findings.title: U9 harmonics in 88-216 MHz band
findings.description: U9 (TPS62162DSG) switching at 0.5 MHz has 257 harmonics in the 88-216 MHz band (harmonics 176-432). Envelope rolloff at 32 MHz (-40 dB/decade above).
findings.recommendation: Minimize switching loop area for U9. Place input cap as close as possible. Consider spread-spectrum modulation if available.

findings.title: U9 harmonics in 216-960 MHz band
findings.description: U9 (TPS62162DSG) switching at 0.5 MHz has 1489 harmonics in the 216-960 MHz band (harmonics 432-1920). Envelope rolloff at 32 MHz (-40 dB/decade above).
findings.recommendation: Minimize switching loop area for U9. Place input cap as close as possible. Consider spread-spectrum modulation if available.

findings.title: U5 harmonic envelope
findings.description: U5 (AP63200WU) switching at 0.50 MHz, duty ≈50%. Harmonic envelope: flat to 0.3 MHz, -20 dB/dec to 32 MHz, -40 dB/dec above. Harmonics extend into FCC test range starting at 60th harmonic. SPICE FFT: h1=138dBµV (envelope: 138), h2=56dBµV (envelope: -187), h3=128dBµV (envelope: 128).
findings.recommendation: Minimize the hot loop area (input cap → high-side switch → inductor → low-side switch → input cap). Every halving of loop area reduces emissions by 6 dB.

findings.title: U7 harmonic envelope
findings.description: U7 (AP63205WU) switching at 0.50 MHz, duty ≈50%. Harmonic envelope: flat to 0.3 MHz, -20 dB/dec to 32 MHz, -40 dB/dec above. Harmonics extend into FCC test range starting at 60th harmonic. SPICE FFT: h1=138dBµV (envelope: 138), h2=56dBµV (envelope: -187), h3=128dBµV (envelope: 128).
findings.recommendation: Minimize the hot loop area (input cap → high-side switch → inductor → low-side switch → input cap). Every halving of loop area reduces emissions by 6 dB.

findings.title: U9 harmonic envelope
findings.description: U9 (TPS62162DSG) switching at 0.50 MHz, duty ≈50%. Harmonic envelope: flat to 0.3 MHz, -20 dB/dec to 32 MHz, -40 dB/dec above. Harmonics extend into FCC test range starting at 60th harmonic. SPICE FFT: h1=138dBµV (envelope: 138), h2=56dBµV (envelope: -187), h3=128dBµV (envelope: 128).
findings.recommendation: Minimize the hot loop area (input cap → high-side switch → inductor → low-side switch → input cap). Every halving of loop area reduces emissions by 6 dB.

findings.title: EMI filter verified for U5
findings.description: U5 (AP63200WU) switching at 0.50 MHz has input LC filter with fc=0.05 MHz (ratio 10×). Provides ≥40 dB attenuation at switching frequency.
findings.recommendation: Input EMI filter appears adequate.

findings.title: EMI filter verified for U7
findings.description: U7 (AP63205WU) switching at 0.50 MHz has input LC filter with fc=0.05 MHz (ratio 10×). Provides ≥40 dB attenuation at switching frequency.
findings.recommendation: Input EMI filter appears adequate.

findings.title: EMI filter verified for U9
findings.description: U9 (TPS62162DSG) switching at 0.50 MHz has input LC filter with fc=0.05 MHz (ratio 10×). Provides ≥40 dB attenuation at switching frequency.
findings.recommendation: Input EMI filter appears adequate.

findings.title: Large hot loop for U5
findings.description: U5 (AP63200WU) hot loop area ≈ 60mm² (triangle: C7 → U5 → L4). Recommended: <25mm² for low EMI.
findings.recommendation: Place C7, U5, and L4 in a tight triangle. Minimize trace length between them. Input cap should be adjacent to the IC with the inductor on the opposite side.

findings.title: Large hot loop for U7
findings.description: U7 (AP63205WU) hot loop area ≈ 25mm² (triangle: C7 → U7 → L3). Recommended: <25mm² for low EMI.
findings.recommendation: Place C7, U7, and L3 in a tight triangle. Minimize trace length between them. Input cap should be adjacent to the IC with the inductor on the opposite side.

findings.title: Large hot loop for U9
findings.description: U9 (TPS62162DSG) hot loop area ≈ 34mm² (triangle: C7 → U9 → L2). Recommended: <25mm² for low EMI.
findings.recommendation: Place C7, U9, and L2 in a tight triangle. Minimize trace length between them. Input cap should be adjacent to the IC with the inductor on the opposite side.

coverage_matrix.note: Design rule checks identify common radiation sources. Cannot predict absolute emission levels.
Switching harmonic analysis and decoupling checks. EMI filter verification not yet implemented.
